query: Virgin Galactic (SPCE) financing, capital raise, cash position and going concern status in 2026. Has the company raised significant capital or secured funding in Q2 2026 (April-June 2026)? What is their current cash runway?
answer:
I've completed the research on Virgin Galactic's (SPCE) financing, cash position, and going concern status in 2026. Here's the summary:

## Direct Answer to Your Question

**Yes — Virgin Galactic raised significant capital in Q2 2026 (April–June)**, but it was primarily through dilutive equity, not a single large strategic injection:
- **~$52M raised via the ATM (at-the-market) equity program in April 2026**
- A **~$30.5M debt-for-equity swap** (reported June 11, 2026), issuing ~6.73M shares to retire part of the 9.80% first-lien notes and extend maturities
- An April 30 notice to redeem up to $10M of 2028 Notes settled in shares
- A new S-3 registering ~$40.2M of ATM securities to preserve fundraising capacity

## Cash Position & Runway
- **~$251M** in cash + equivalents + marketable securities as of March 31, 2026 (down from ~$338M at end-2025)
- Burning **~$90M+/quarter** (Q1 FCF –$93.3M; Q2 guided to –$87M to –$92M)
- **Cash runway is only a few quarters** absent continued fundraising

## Going Concern
- The Q1 2026 10-Q (filed May 14, 2026) contains **explicit "substantial doubt" going-concern language** — management said its cash outlook raises substantial doubt about continuing operations another 12 months absent future fundraising or revenue.

**Key caveat:** The latest hard balance-sheet data is March 31, 2026. Q2 2026 (June 30) financials had not yet been filed as of the research date (July 10, 2026), so the Q2 financing actions are drawn from company statements and news reporting rather than a filed 10-Q. The company is essentially funding itself quarter-to-quarter through ongoing dilution while it works toward Q3 2026 flight tests and a targeted Q4 2026 first commercial spaceflight.

sources.title: Virgin Galactic Holdings 10-Q for period ended March 31, 2026
sources.snippet: Cash and cash equivalents $124,837; Restricted cash 30,634; Marketable securities 95,054; issuance of $212.5M 9.80% First Lien Notes due 2028; Registered Offering $45.6M.

sources.title: Virgin Galactic Announces First Quarter 2026 Financial Results (8-K Exhibit 99.1)
sources.snippet: Cash position remains strong, with cash, cash equivalents and marketable securities of $251 million as of March 31, 2026.

sources.title: Virgin Galactic reports loss and warns on liquidity | SPCE 10-Q
sources.snippet: Virgin Galactic flags going concern risk despite smaller loss; held $250.5M of cash, cash equivalents, restricted cash and marketable securities as of March 31 2026, used $53.5M.

sources.title: Virgin Galactic narrows Q1 loss and guides 2026 free cash flow | SPCE 8-K
sources.snippet: Raised $11M via ATM in Q1 and about $52M more in April; offered to redeem $10M of debt using stock; Q2 2026 FCF guided to -$87M to -$92M.

sources.title: Virgin Galactic Stock Faces A 2026 Spaceflight Test As Cash Burn Narrows But Funding Risk Stays
sources.snippet: Substantial doubt about operating another 12 months; Q1 ATM $11M, April ATM $52M, ~$87M remaining capacity; ~$40.2M new S-3; Q1 FCF -$93.3M.

sources.title: SPCE Stock Jumps As Virgin Galactic Extends Cash Runway
sources.snippet: $30.5M debt-for-equity swap; issued ~6.73M new shares to retire part of 9.80% first-lien notes, pushing remaining principal to 2028.

sources.title: Virgin Galactic posts Q1 2026 net loss of $64.7M, cash and securities $251M; free cash flow -$93.3M
sources.snippet: Q1 2026 revenue $0.2M, GAAP net loss $64.7M, $251M cash and securities, free cash flow -$93.3M.

sources.title: Virgin Galactic registers $40.21M for ATM offerings (S-3)
sources.snippet: Virgin Galactic registered ~$40.21M of securities for ATM offerings.

sources.title: Virgin Galactic Soars: SPCE Doubles—Will the Rally Last in 2026?
sources.snippet: SPCE closed June 1, 2026 at $7.52, up 125% in five sessions, after a Q1 beat and reports of a new strategic investor.
